project.name: ar-tata-surya
project.scope: Bugfix: camera layering, marker-relative GLB scale normalization, compact focus overlays, and debug telemetry. No visual redesign.
assumptionsToValidate: AR.js injects a camera video element into the DOM.
Camera permissions are granted before AR start.
GLB assets may have inconsistent source dimensions and pivot centers.

motionPaletteDecision.densityDecisionSource: Compact focus controls and debug-only scale telemetry keep the camera view dominant.
motionPaletteDecision.paletteAutopilotRisk: avoid opaque overlays that hide camera feed
motionPaletteDecision.spatialDecision: 3d-canvas-required-for-ar-scene; model scale is normalized with bounding boxes before display

conceptualAnchor.name: Optical Viewfinder Overlay
conceptualAnchor.anchorReference: Optical viewfinder with matte box and HUD markings
conceptualAnchor.specificReferencePoint: camera viewfinder frame and matte box
conceptualAnchor.rationale: Layering, occlusion control, and model fit should mimic a viewfinder: camera feed is base, overlays are transparent and precise, and the object stays inside the marker frame.
conceptualAnchor.signatureMotion: status overlays fade in/out quickly while GLB objects rotate slowly inside a bounded marker-relative frame
conceptualAnchor.typographicDecision: display for titles, body for instructions, monospace for debug data

derivedTokenLogic.anchorReference: Optical viewfinder with matte box and HUD markings
derivedTokenLogic.morphology: thin overlay frames and transparent layers
derivedTokenLogic.motion: short fades for status and slow object rotation for spatial comprehension

derivedTokenLogic.anchorReference: Optical viewfinder with matte box and HUD markings
derivedTokenLogic.colorDerivationSource: Existing dark UI overlays are retained, but camera feed stays visible.
derivedTokenLogic.spacingDerivationSource: Spacing favors top chip scanning and bottom compact disclosure to keep the marker center unobstructed.
derivedTokenLogic.typographyDerivationSource: Display and body roles are preserved for clarity in small screens.
derivedTokenLogic.motionDerivationSource: Short status fades and slow model rotation follow the optical viewfinder anchor without decorative overlay motion.
derivedTokenLogic.validationRule: No overlay or normalized GLB should hide the camera feed or dominate the marker area when video is ready.

libraryDecisions.name: A-Frame
libraryDecisions.fallbackIfUnavailable: block AR with a clear error message

libraryDecisions.name: AR.js
libraryDecisions.fallbackIfUnavailable: block AR with a clear error message

aiSafeUiAudit.rationale: This change preserves the existing UI and focuses on camera visibility and layering.

repoEvidence.designEvidenceSummary: Existing AR UI uses glass overlays and loading/error panels; no redesign requested.

notes: Overlays remain readable on top of live video.
No new motion beyond status transitions.
